title: EDUCATION AND TRAINING - 211info
text: MID-OREGON REGION OFFICE EDUCATION AND TRAINING Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides training on topics such as collaborative problem solving, mental health first aid, self-care, trauma-informed care, and family-led crisis planning. 4263 Commercial Street SE Suite 300 Salem, OR 97301 Eligibility: Professionals, volunteers, staff, community partners, youth, mentors, peer support, and family members Hours: No standard hours Email (503) 709-1366 . Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 709-1366 Workforce and Quality Improvement Director Victoria Haight [email protected] Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or visit website for more information FEES: Varies by program DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: State of Oregon Services: Disability Awareness Training Parenting Skills Classes * Disabilities Issues Other Services Offered At This Location: COMMUNITY GROUPS AND GOVERNMENT/ADMINISTRATIVE OFFICES - ADMINISTRATIVE OFFICE INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - REACH OUT OREGON If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. MID-OREGON REGION OFFICE
